mapper.sql: id, employee_id, checkin_date, checkin_time, checkout_time, is_late, is_early, late_confirmed, early_confirmed, salary_deduct, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (employee_id, checkin_date, checkin_time, create_time) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{checkinDate}, #{checkinTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM attendance ORDER BY checkin_date DESC, checkin_time DESC

SELECT e.employee_id as employeeId, e.name, SUM(a.is_late) as totalLate, SUM(a.late_confirmed) as confirmedLate, SUM(a.is_early) as totalEarly, SUM(a.early_confirmed) as confirmedEarly, COALESCE(SUM(a.salary_deduct), 0) as totalDeduct FROM employee e LEFT JOIN attendance a ON e.employee_id = a.employee_id GROUP BY e.employee_id, e.name

SELECT SUM(is_late) as totalLate, SUM(late_confirmed) as confirmedLate, SUM(is_early) as totalEarly, SUM(early_confirmed) as confirmedEarly, COALESCE(SUM(salary_deduct), 0) as totalDeduct FROM attendance WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance SET late_confirmed = 1, salary_deduct = salary_deduct + 50 WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND is_late = 1 AND late_confirmed = 0
UPDATE attendance SET early_confirmed = 1, salary_deduct = salary_deduct + 50 WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND is_early = 1 AND early_confirmed = 0
UPDATE attendance SET late_confirmed = 0, salary_deduct = salary_deduct - 50 WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND is_late = 1 AND late_confirmed = 1 AND salary_deduct >= 50
UPDATE attendance SET early_confirmed = 0, salary_deduct = salary_deduct - 50 WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND is_early = 1 AND early_confirmed = 1 AND salary_deduct >= 50
UPDATE attendance SET is_early = 1 WHERE checkout_time IS NULL AND DATE_FORMAT(checkin_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') AND is_early = 0
